prompt: The Supplemental Claim form at src/applications/appeals/995 already has a prefillTransformer but I want to add the profilePersonalInfoPage and profileContactInfoPages from the prefill pattern. Can you set it up?
assertions: Preserves the existing prefillTransformer (does not replace it wholesale)
Adds both prefill pages to a chapter in formConfig
Ensures the existing prefillTransformer output includes ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName (or configures dataAdapter if nested)
Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions
